17. ~has_few_resources(X0) | proves_economic_hardship(X0) [cnf transformation 11]

21. takes_gre(tom) [cnf transformation 6]

23. ~proves_economic_hardship(X0) | ~takes_gre(X0) [forward subsumption resolution 16,22]
